method: Local path-level simulation of a persistent profit-lock ratchet layered on top of the v25 time-gated breakeven baseline. Profit lock can only activate during the first 180 minutes, but once activated its stop persists for the rest of the trade.

candidate_summary.interpretation: A profit-lock branch is only interesting if it improves full-sample local PnL without creating large winner clipping. If even the best persistent ratchet cannot clear that bar, the next exit-side branch should move away from naive profit-lock thresholds.
